compartment.title: Over-restoration from backup after config deletion

compartments.compartment: User reported another AI deleted the entire config. Assistant restored from the backup file created during the previous modification session, but inadvertently included many v4.3.0 features (keyword_detector, ralph_loop, experimental, skills, git_master, websearch, team_mode limits) that were not in the user's original config, resulting in 37 properties instead of the original subset.

compartment.title: Corrected to base config with direct models

compartments.compartment: User rejected the over-restoration, pointing to `oh-my-openagent omni.json` as the true base config before v4.3 upgrades, and insisted on direct model identifiers instead of `omniroute/auto/*` combos because omniroute has problems with combos. Assistant read the 180-line base config across several attempts, identified it used combo models and lacked many v4.3 sections, compared it against the previous restoration, and deferred model selection to the user. U: con modelos diferentes para que hagas la reconstruccion con modelos directos y no combos porque ahora mismo tiene problemas omniroute con los combos This directive established the constraint to use direct model identifiers instead of combo routes. Outcome: base config was read and analyzed, and the user was asked to choose between model options (Kimi k2.6-thinking for reasoning, DeepSeek flash-free for coding/fast, or alternatives).

facts.CONSTRAINTS: * Use direct model identifiers instead of `omniroute/auto/*` combo routes because omniroute has problems with combo routing.
